intitule: Reading a Song: 'We Are the World'

enonce.texte:
Read the lyrics from the famous song 'We Are the World'.

We Are the World

There comes a time when we heed a certain call
When the world must come together as one
There are people dying
And it's time to lend a hand to life
The greatest gift of all

We are the world, we are the children
We are the ones who make a brighter day
So let's start giving
There's a choice we're making
We're saving our own lives
It's true we'll make a better day
Just you and me
images: Image of Michael Jackson and Lionel Richie performing 'We Are the World' with other artists.

questions.texte: What is the title of the song?
questions.reponse: The title of the song is 'We Are the World'.

questions.texte: What does the song say about the world?
questions.reponse: The song says that the world must come together as one.

questions.texte: What is 'the greatest gift of all' according to the song?
questions.reponse: According to the song, 'the greatest gift of all' is life.

questions.texte: What does the song encourage people to do?
questions.reponse: The song encourages people to start giving and to make a better day.

questions.texte: Who are 'the children' in the song?
questions.reponse: In the song, 'the children' refers to all people, suggesting that everyone is part of one big family.

enonce.texte:
Read this advertisement for a new music album.

NEW ALBUM 'AFRICAN RHYTHMS'

Discover the beautiful sounds of Africa!

This album features 12 songs with traditional African instruments. You will hear the djembe, the kora, and the balafon. The songs are about love, nature, and the joy of life. The album is available in all music stores and online. Get your copy today!

Special offer: only 5,000 CFA for the first 100 buyers!
images: Album cover art showing traditional African instruments and a colorful design.

questions.texte: What is the title of the album?
questions.reponse: The title of the album is 'African Rhythms'.

questions.texte: How many songs are on the album?
questions.reponse: There are 12 songs on the album.

questions.texte: What are the songs about?
questions.reponse: The songs are about love, nature, and the joy of life.

questions.texte: What is the special offer?
questions.reponse: The special offer is 5,000 CFA for the first 100 buyers.

questions.texte: Where can you buy the album?
questions.reponse: You can buy the album in all music stores and online.

enonce.texte:
Look at the film poster for 'The Lion King'.

THE LION KING

An epic adventure about a young lion named Simba.
Simba is the future king of the Pride Lands.
But his uncle Scar wants to take the throne.
Simba runs away and meets new friends: Timon the meerkat and Pumbaa the warthog.
They teach him to 'Hakuna Matata' – no worries!
Will Simba return to save his kingdom?

Rated PG | Now showing in cinemas!
images: Poster for 'The Lion King' showing Simba with Timon and Pumbaa.

questions.texte: What is the name of the film?
questions.reponse: The name of the film is 'The Lion King'.

questions.texte: What is the main character's name?
questions.reponse: The main character's name is Simba.

questions.texte: Who is the villain in the film?
questions.reponse: The villain is Scar, Simba's uncle.

questions.texte: What does 'Hakuna Matata' mean?
questions.reponse: 'Hakuna Matata' means 'no worries'.

questions.texte: Describe the film in one sentence.
questions.reponse: The Lion King is an epic adventure about a young lion who must overcome challenges to become king.

enonce.texte: Your friend wants to know about a song you like. Write a short review of your favorite song.

questions.texte: Name the song and the artist who sings it.
questions.reponse: My favorite song is 'Shape of You' by Ed Sheeran.

questions.texte: Describe the music (is it fast, slow, happy, sad?).
questions.reponse: The music is fast and happy. It makes me want to dance.

questions.texte: Describe the lyrics. What is the song about?
questions.reponse: The lyrics are about love and attraction. It tells a story of a man who meets a woman in a club.

questions.texte: Why do you like this song?
questions.reponse: I like this song because the melody is catchy and the words are easy to remember. It puts me in a good mood.

questions.texte: Write a complete review of the song in 4-5 sentences.
questions.reponse: 'Shape of You' by Ed Sheeran is my favorite song. It has a fast and happy rhythm. The lyrics tell a story of love at first sight. The melody is very catchy and easy to sing along to. I love this song because it always makes me feel happy.

enonce.texte: Your school is organizing a film club. Write a short text to recommend a film your friends should watch.

questions.texte: What is the title of the film?
questions.reponse: I recommend 'Coco'.

questions.texte: Who is the main character?
questions.reponse: The main character is a boy named Miguel.

questions.texte: What is the film about?
questions.reponse: 'Coco' is about a boy who loves music but his family forbids it. He travels to the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather. It is a film about family, dreams, and memories.

questions.texte: Why do you think your friends should watch this film?
questions.reponse: I think my friends should watch this film because it is beautiful and touching. It teaches us that family is important and that we should never give up on our dreams. The music is also wonderful.

questions.texte: Write a complete recommendation for the film in 4-5 sentences.
questions.reponse: I recommend the film 'Coco'. It is a wonderful animated film about a boy named Miguel who loves music. He goes on an adventure to the Land of the Dead. The film shows the importance of family and following your dreams. The songs are beautiful and the story is very moving. I am sure you will enjoy it!
